title.en: The Annexes of 802.1Q: A Field Guide to A through W
title.zh: 802.1Q 的附录：从 A 到 W 的导览地图

blocks.en: After the numbered clauses of IEEE Std 802.1Q-2022 end, the standard keeps going for hundreds of pages of annexes labeled A through W. They fall into two kinds. A **normative** annex (marked "normative") is part of the rules: to claim conformance you must obey it. An **informative** annex (marked "informative") is teaching material—background, examples, and analysis that help you understand the numbered clauses but add no new requirements. This lesson is a guided tour of all 23 annexes so you know exactly where to look when a question arises.
blocks.zh: 在 IEEE Std 802.1Q-2022 编号正文结束之后，标准还附有数百页的附录，编号从 A 到 W。它们分为两类。**规范性（normative）**附录是规则的一部分：要声明符合标准，就必须遵守它。**资料性（informative）**附录则是讲解材料——背景、示例与分析，帮助你理解编号正文，但不引入任何新要求。本课将带你逐一浏览全部 23 个附录，让你在遇到问题时确切知道去哪里查。

blocks.en: Quick rule of thumb: "normative" annexes (A, B, C, D, E, M) constrain what a conformant product does; "informative" annexes (F through L, N through L's siblings, and Q through W) explain *why* and *how*. If you are auditing a product, read the normative ones; if you are learning the design, read the informative ones.
blocks.zh: 速记法则：规范性附录（A、B、C、D、E、M）约束符合标准的产品行为；资料性附录（F 到 L、N 等，以及 Q 到 W）解释*为什么*以及*怎么做*。如果你在审核产品，请读规范性附录；如果你在学习设计思路，请读资料性附录。

blocks.en: Four annexes form the conformance and encoding backbone. **Annex A (normative)** is the **PICS proforma** for Bridge implementations—a PICS (Protocol Implementation Conformance Statement) is a fixed questionnaire a vendor fills in to declare exactly which features it built. **Annex B (normative)** is the same questionnaire but for **end station** implementations. **Annex C (normative)** specifies **Designated MSRP Node (DMN)** behavior—MSRP is the Multiple Stream Reservation Protocol—on IEEE 802.11 networks and Coordinated Shared Networks (CSNs), where one node acts as Network Coordinator handing out transmission opportunities. **Annex D (normative)** defines the **IEEE 802.1 Organizationally Specific TLVs**—TLV means Type-Length-Value, the self-describing data chunks carried inside LLDP (Link Layer Discovery Protocol) frames to advertise VLAN IDs, priority/flow-control config, and more.
blocks.zh: 有四个附录构成了一致性与编码的主干。**附录 A（规范性）**是桥（Bridge）实现的 **PICS 表格**——PICS（协议实现一致性声明）是供应商填写的固定问卷，用于精确声明自己实现了哪些功能。**附录 B（规范性）**是同样的问卷，但面向**端站（end station）**实现。**附录 C（规范性）**规定了 IEEE 802.11 网络与协调共享网络（CSN）上的**指定 MSRP 节点（DMN）**行为——MSRP 即多流预约协议；在 CSN 中，一个节点充当网络协调者，分发传输机会。**附录 D（规范性）**定义了 **IEEE 802.1 组织专属 TLV**——TLV 即类型-长度-值，是封装在 LLDP（链路层发现协议）帧里、用于通告 VLAN ID、优先级/流控配置等的自描述数据块。

blocks.en: The standard is full of state machines, and **Annex E (normative)** is the legend that explains how to read them: each state is a box split in two (an upper name in capitals, a lower list of entry actions), arrows are transitions whose labels are TRUE/FALSE conditions, UCT means an unconditional transition, ELSE fires when nothing else matches, and the special BEGIN condition resets everything. Without Annex E the diagrams elsewhere would be ambiguous. Then come the conceptual explainers. **Annex F (informative)** contrasts **Shared VLAN Learning (SVL)**—where MAC addresses learned in one VLAN are reused across others—with **Independent VLAN Learning (IVL)**, where each VLAN keeps its own learning, via the idea of FIDs (Filtering IDentifiers, effectively separate forwarding tables). **Annex G (informative)** covers MAC-method-dependent details of VLAN support, such as how a tagged Ethernet frame is laid out and how padding to the 64-octet minimum is handled.
blocks.zh: 标准中充满状态机，**附录 E（规范性）**正是解读它们的图例：每个状态是一个被横线分成两半的方框（上半部是大写的状态名，下半部是进入时执行的动作），箭头表示状态转移，其标签是取值为 TRUE/FALSE 的条件，UCT 表示无条件转移，ELSE 在其他条件都不满足时触发，特殊的 BEGIN 条件则重置一切。没有附录 E，别处的状态图就会含糊不清。接着是概念性的讲解。**附录 F（资料性）**对比了**共享 VLAN 学习（SVL）**——某个 VLAN 学到的 MAC 地址可被其他 VLAN 复用——与**独立 VLAN 学习（IVL）**——每个 VLAN 各自学习；这一对比通过 FID（过滤标识符，实质上是相互独立的转发表）的概念展开。**附录 G（资料性）**讲解 VLAN 支持中与 MAC 方法相关的细节，例如带标签的以太网帧的格式，以及如何把帧填充到 64 字节的最小长度。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 520 90" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="4" y="30" width="90" height="30"/><text x="49" y="49" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Dest Addr</text><rect x="94" y="30" width="90" height="30"/><text x="139" y="49" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Src Addr</text><rect x="184" y="30" width="70" height="30"/><text x="219" y="45" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">TPID</text><text x="219" y="56" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">0x8100</text><rect x="254" y="30" width="90" height="30"/><text x="299" y="45" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">TCI: PCP|DEI</text><text x="299" y="56" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">+ VID (12b)</text><rect x="344" y="30" width="70" height="30"/><text x="379" y="49" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">Len/Type</text><rect x="414" y="30" width="60" height="30"/><text x="444" y="49" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Data</text><rect x="474" y="30" width="42" height="30"/><text x="495" y="49" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">FCS</text><text x="260" y="22" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9">VLAN tag (Annex G)</text></svg>

caption.en: A VLAN-tagged Ethernet frame as illustrated in Annex G: the 4-octet tag (TPID + Tag Control Information carrying priority, DEI, and the 12-bit VID) sits between the source address and the length/type field.
caption.zh: 附录 G 所示的带 VLAN 标签的以太网帧：4 字节的标签（TPID 加上承载优先级、DEI 和 12 位 VID 的标签控制信息）位于源地址与长度/类型字段之间。

blocks.en: The next cluster is about coexistence and quality of service. **Annex H (informative)** lists interoperability considerations—how VLAN Bridges, MAC Bridges, and VLAN-aware versus VLAN-unaware end stations stay consistent under spanning-tree reconfiguration. **Annex I (informative)** explains the rationale behind the default priority-to-traffic-class mappings and the eight traffic types (Network Control, Voice, Video, and so on) plus drop precedence. **Annex J (informative)** gives the design history and deployment advice for **CFM (Connectivity Fault Management)**, the Ethernet OAM (Operations, Administration, and Maintenance) toolkit. **Annex K (informative)** walks through use cases for a **TPMR (Two-Port MAC Relay)**, such as serving as a User-to-Network Interface demarcation device. **Annex L (informative)** is a deep analysis of the **credit-based shaper** algorithm, showing how its single idleSlope parameter sets the bandwidth fraction a queue may use.
blocks.zh: 下一组讲的是共存与服务质量。**附录 H（资料性）**列出互操作性注意事项——VLAN 桥、MAC 桥，以及支持 VLAN 与不支持 VLAN 的端站，如何在生成树重配置时保持一致。**附录 I（资料性）**解释默认的优先级到流量类别映射的依据，以及八种流量类型（网络控制、语音、视频等）和丢弃优先级。**附录 J（资料性）**给出 **CFM（连通性故障管理）**——以太网 OAM（运行、管理与维护）工具集——的设计渊源与部署建议。**附录 K（资料性）**逐一介绍 **TPMR（双端口 MAC 中继）**的用例，例如充当用户-网络接口的分界设备。**附录 L（资料性）**深入分析**基于信用的整形器**算法，展示其单一参数 idleSlope 如何决定某队列可用的带宽比例。

blocks.en:
flowchart LR A[Express frame ready] --> B{Preemptible frame
mid-transmission?} B -->|yes| C[Cut into fragment
send express now] B -->|no| D[Send express
immediately] C --> E[Resume preemptible
fragment after] E --> F[Annexes R and S:
preemption + MACsec
+ scheduling]
blocks.zh:
flowchart LR A[加急帧就绪] --> B{是否有可抢占帧
正在传输?} B -->|是| C[切成片段
立即发加急帧] B -->|否| D[立即发送
加急帧] C --> E[随后续传
可抢占帧片段] E --> F[附录 R 与 S:
抢占 + MACsec
+ 调度]

blocks.en: The flow-control and Time-Sensitive Networking (TSN) annexes round out the set. **Annex M (normative)** defines a PDU format so **PFC (Priority-based Flow Control)** can run on link layers that lack the IEEE 802.3 MAC Control sublayer. **Annex N (informative)** shows how to size receive buffers so PFC stops a sender before frames are dropped. **Annex O (informative)** explains how a MAC Bridge preserves **FCS (Frame Check Sequence)** integrity when it must regenerate the checksum across dissimilar media. **Annex P (informative)** examines how rapid spanning-tree (RSTP) reconfiguration can briefly cause frame duplication or misordering. **Annex Q (informative)** motivates **traffic scheduling** and the guard-band concept; **Annex R (informative)** answers how frame preemption interacts with **MACsec (MAC Security, IEEE 802.1AE)**; and **Annex S (informative)** lays out the four useful permutations of scheduling and preemption.
blocks.zh: 流控与时间敏感网络（TSN）附录补齐了整套内容。**附录 M（规范性）**定义了一种 PDU 格式，使 **PFC（基于优先级的流控）**能运行在缺少 IEEE 802.3 MAC 控制子层的链路层上。**附录 N（资料性）**说明如何确定接收缓冲区大小，使 PFC 能在丢帧之前及时让发送方停下。**附录 O（资料性）**解释当 MAC 桥必须跨异构介质重算校验和时，如何保持 **FCS（帧校验序列）**的完整性。**附录 P（资料性）**研究快速生成树（RSTP）重配置如何可能短暂造成帧重复或乱序。**附录 Q（资料性）**阐述**流量调度**的动机与保护带（guard band）概念；**附录 R（资料性）**回答帧抢占如何与 **MACsec（MAC 安全，IEEE 802.1AE）**交互；**附录 S（资料性）**则给出调度与抢占的四种实用组合。

blocks.en: The final TSN cluster is the most hands-on. **Annex T (informative)** describes **Cyclic Queuing and Forwarding (CQF)**, where time is sliced into equal intervals so a frame sent in interval *i* is forwarded in *i+1*, giving a latency that depends only on the cycle time and hop count. **Annex U (informative)** gives worked **TSN configuration examples** for Clause 46, including a time-aware Talker running synchronized 500 µs application loops. **Annex V (informative)** is the **Asynchronous Traffic Shaping (ATS) delay-analysis framework**—a mathematical method for bounding worst-case end-to-end delay across hops. And **Annex W (informative)** is the **Bibliography**: the numbered list of external references the standard cites for further reading. Together these last annexes turn the abstract scheduling clauses into something an engineer can actually deploy and verify.
blocks.zh: 最后一组 TSN 附录最具实操性。**附录 T（资料性）**描述**循环排队与转发（CQF）**：把时间切成等长的间隔，在间隔 *i* 发出的帧将在 *i+1* 转发，从而使时延只取决于周期时长与跳数。**附录 U（资料性）**给出第 46 章的**TSN 配置实例**，包括一个运行同步 500 µs 应用循环的时间感知 Talker。**附录 V（资料性）**是**异步流量整形（ATS）时延分析框架**——一种对跨跳最坏端到端时延进行上界估计的数学方法。**附录 W（资料性）**是**参考文献**：标准引用的外部文献编号清单，供进一步阅读。这最后几个附录共同把抽象的调度正文，变成工程师真正能部署并验证的东西。

summary.en: Coverage map: every annex A–W with its exact page and normative/informative status
summary.zh: 覆盖地图：A 到 W 每个附录的确切页码及规范性/资料性状态

blocks.en: Conformance & encoding (normative): Annex A (p.1852) PICS proforma for Bridges; Annex B (p.1922) PICS proforma for end stations; Annex C (p.1938) Designated MSRP Node (DMN) on 802.11/CSN; Annex D (p.1954) IEEE 802.1 Organizationally Specific TLVs (Table D-1 lists Port VLAN ID, VLAN Name, ETS, PFC config, etc.); Annex E (p.2055) state-diagram notation (UCT, ELSE, BEGIN, global transitions). VLAN/bridging background (informative): Annex F (p.2057) SVL vs IVL via FIDs; Annex G (p.2066) MAC-method-dependent VLAN support, tagged-frame format and padding; Annex H (p.2070) interoperability considerations; Annex I (p.2076) priority and drop precedence rationale; Annex J (p.2084) CFM design and deployment; Annex K (p.2091) TPMR use cases. QoS/flow control: Annex L (p.2096, informative) credit-based shaper analysis (idleSlope, bandwidthFraction); Annex M (p.2113, normative) PFC PDU for link layers without MAC Control; Annex N (p.2114, informative) PFC buffer sizing; Annex O (p.2119, informative) FCS integrity in MAC Bridges; Annex P (p.2126, informative) frame duplication and misordering under RSTP. TSN (all informative): Annex Q (p.2129) traffic scheduling and guard bands; Annex R (p.2132) preemption and MACsec (IEEE 802.1AE); Annex S (p.2134) preemption + scheduled traffic (four permutations); Annex T (p.2137) Cyclic Queuing and Forwarding; Annex U (p.2145) TSN configuration examples for Clause 46; Annex V (p.2153) Asynchronous Traffic Shaping delay-analysis framework; Annex W (p.2159) Bibliography.
blocks.zh: 一致性与编码（规范性）：附录 A（第 1852 页）桥的 PICS 表格；附录 B（第 1922 页）端站的 PICS 表格；附录 C（第 1938 页）802.11/CSN 上的指定 MSRP 节点（DMN）；附录 D（第 1954 页）IEEE 802.1 组织专属 TLV（表 D-1 列出端口 VLAN ID、VLAN 名称、ETS、PFC 配置等）；附录 E（第 2055 页）状态图记号（UCT、ELSE、BEGIN、全局转移）。VLAN/桥接背景（资料性）：附录 F（第 2057 页）经由 FID 的 SVL 与 IVL；附录 G（第 2066 页）与 MAC 方法相关的 VLAN 支持、带标签帧格式与填充；附录 H（第 2070 页）互操作性注意事项；附录 I（第 2076 页）优先级与丢弃优先级的依据；附录 J（第 2084 页）CFM 设计与部署；附录 K（第 2091 页）TPMR 用例。QoS/流控：附录 L（第 2096 页，资料性）基于信用的整形器分析（idleSlope、bandwidthFraction）；附录 M（第 2113 页，规范性）面向无 MAC 控制的链路层的 PFC PDU；附录 N（第 2114 页，资料性）PFC 缓冲区估算；附录 O（第 2119 页，资料性）MAC 桥中的 FCS 完整性；附录 P（第 2126 页，资料性）RSTP 下的帧重复与乱序。TSN（均为资料性）：附录 Q（第 2129 页）流量调度与保护带；附录 R（第 2132 页）抢占与 MACsec（IEEE 802.1AE）；附录 S（第 2134 页）抢占加调度流量（四种组合）；附录 T（第 2137 页）循环排队与转发；附录 U（第 2145 页）第 46 章的 TSN 配置实例；附录 V（第 2153 页）异步流量整形时延分析框架；附录 W（第 2159 页）参考文献。

blocks.en: How to use this guide in practice: need to prove conformance? Annexes A and B. Decoding a state machine? Annex E. Designing a deterministic factory network? Annexes Q, S, T, U, and V are your toolkit, with L for the credit-based shaper. Chasing a fault? Annex J (CFM). Tuning lossless data-center links? Annexes M and N (PFC). The annexes are not filler—they are the reference shelf that makes the numbered clauses usable.
blocks.zh: 实战用法：需要证明一致性？查附录 A 和 B。解读状态机？查附录 E。设计确定性的工厂网络？附录 Q、S、T、U、V 就是你的工具箱，再配上讲基于信用整形器的附录 L。排查故障？查附录 J（CFM）。调优无损数据中心链路？查附录 M 和 N（PFC）。这些附录不是凑数——它们是让编号正文真正可用的参考书架。

cites.note: Opening pages of all 23 annexes A through W of IEEE Std 802.1Q-2022, each verified by reading the page.
